questionHtml: Similarly, by instead deleting the vertex which represents Seattle, determine another lower bound.
markschemeHtml:
by deleting S, Kruskal gives MST for the remainder as LD, DC, DN weight 95          (A1)

(lower bound is therefore 95+(58+66)=) $219          A1

 

Note: Award (A1) if 26+30+39 seen in any order.

 

[2 marks]
